mapper.insert: insert into graph_facts ( entity_id, predicate, value, source_ref, source_start_line, source_end_line, evidence_excerpt, confidence, extractor, asserted_at, superseded_by, tombstoned ) values ( #{fact.entityId}, #{fact.predicate}, #{fact.value}, #{fact.sourceRef}, #{fact.sourceStartLine}, #{fact.sourceEndLine}, #{fact.evidenceExcerpt}, #{fact.confidence}, #{fact.extractor}, current_timestamp, null, false )
